question: What is the strongest caller-facing reading of API2 union_platform after combining anonymous same-day semantics, real anonymous visitor-cookie replay, and the focused 535/540/541 capability sweep?
scope: Compact union_platform summary for API2 direct-call parameter closure

canonical_default.current_reason: Canonical examples keep 3, and no tested override has unlocked a richer branch or a new capability family.

matrix_reading: tid=535 stayed on the same richer detail shape across the tested union_platform values.
tid=540 stayed on the same thin positive shell with duration across the tested union_platform values.
tid=541 stayed on the same thinner positive shell without duration across the tested union_platform values.
No tested union_platform value promoted tid=540 or tid=541 toward the richer tid=535 field shape.

environment_replay_reading: Adding real anonymous visitor-cookie replay did not introduce a new signature split in the API2 contract matrix.
This includes the currently watched union_platform branch family plus XML/JSONP switching, callback-bearing JSONP, mixed valid+invalid batches, all-invalid JSONP batches, and 32/33 boundaries.
verdict: Current evidence keeps union_platform in the scoped-negative bucket: changing or omitting it has not produced a visible branch split in the tested anonymous direct-call environments.

The strongest focused evidence is now three-layered: same-day anonymous repeated-key semantics, real anonymous visitor-cookie replay, and the 535/540/541 x union_platform capability sweep on two public anchor vids.
This is still not a global no-op proof and should not be promoted into one before aged-cookie or login-state replay exists.
formal_verdict: Keep union_platform=3 for canonical caller-facing recipes.
Do not claim that union_platform is globally irrelevant; the current best reading only says no visible split has been observed in the tested anonymous and real-anonymous replay scope.
The next valuable closure step is cross-environment replay, not another generic anonymous rerun.
remaining_gaps_refined: Aged-cookie replay under the same visitor flow
Broader public VID coverage outside the current two anchor vids and the tested 535/540/541 family
Whether any environment-specific gate makes union_platform matter only after session-state changes
